name: Physical Self-Supervised Learning: IMU Sensing without Manual Labels
summary: arXiv:2607.18361v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deep neural networks have become a promising approach for IMU-based sensing, but their scalability is fundamentally limited by costly labeled data...
description: arXiv:2607.18361v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deep neural networks have become a promising approach for IMU-based sensing, but their scalability is fundamentally limited by costly labeled data and poor robustness to heterogeneous devices, placements, and users. Existing unsupervised and self-supervised methods reduce but do not remove this dependence, still requiring labeled data for domain...
author: Yuyang Leng (Richard), Renyuan Liu (Richard), Shaohan Hu (Richard), Peijun Zhao (Richard), Chun-Fu Chen (Richard), Songqing Chen, Shuochao Yao
